name: std-fitness-studio
description: Fitness studio: member directory, recurring group-class scheduling, tiered memberships, and class rosters. Pick for gym/yoga/dance studio apps (Mindbody pattern).

emits.description: Fired when the BrowseItem collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the (possibly paginated) slice and totalCount holds the unsliced filter total. totalCount is optional so compiled-path emitters that haven't been migrated yet still validate
Fired when the BrowseItem collection fails to load

children.content: Group classes for the week. Start a class to open its roster; cancel to notify enrolled members.
Recurring subscriptions per member. Upgrade tiers, freeze, or cancel from the row actions.
Enrolled members per session. Check in arrivals or mark no-shows from the row actions.
